visual_features.overall_style: Elegant, spiritual, and somewhat traditional. Strong use of deep maroon and rose tones, large expressive photography, and an italic serif display type give it a ceremonial, mystical feel rather than a techy/modern one. The design leans toward a classic editorial hero with a sacred-symbol brand mark, minimal interface chrome, and a focus on emotional imagery.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is dominated by a large split hero: left side a vivid retreat photograph, right side a deep maroon panel with very large italic serif headline 'The Desert Rose Mystery School' and a prominent emblem. The eye is first drawn to the text block (bright white on dark maroon with large point size), then to the emblem, then to the group photo. The top navigation is thin and understated (small white text) and visually secondary to the hero content. Below the fold, the centered 'Ahava' heading on white background appears as the next major anchor.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate-to-generous whitespace around text below the hero (particularly the white 'Ahava' section). The hero itself is visually dense (full-bleed image and saturated maroon panel) but still balanced through the 50/50 split and large margins around the headline text. The top navigation bar is slim with enough padding to breathe yet not bulky. Overall, the design favors comfortable spacing rather than compressed content.
unique_elements: Split hero layout: full-bleed retreat photograph on the left and a dark maroon hero panel with floral texture on the right.
Large sacred hamsa/hand emblem used both in the top bar and enlarged in the hero area.
Background maroon hero panel appears to include subtle floral/rose imagery, adding depth and symbolism without overpowering the typography.
Very prominent, calligraphic italic serif headline that strongly conveys mysticism and ceremony.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column or similar desktop grid, with a full-width structure. The hero uses an approximate 6/6 split between the photograph (left) and the maroon text/emblem panel (right). Below, content moves into a single centered column on white.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width top navigation bar; full-width split hero section; followed by centered, single-column content sections on a white background.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top fixed/anchored navigation bar; below that, a large hero section acting as the primary introduction; followed by content sections beginning with a centered heading ('Ahava'). Sections are visually separated by clear background changes (deep maroon hero vs white body) and generous vertical gaps.
layout_characteristics.alignment: Navigation items right-aligned within the top bar, logo left-aligned. Hero content is right-aligned within the maroon panel, with text aligned flush left inside its block but positioned toward the right side of the screen. Below the hero, headings and body text are center-aligned for a more ceremonial, invitation-like feel. Elements appear to snap to a consistent vertical rhythm.
responsive_hints: The split hero suggests a desktop layout that would likely collapse into a stacked image-over-text layout on mobile (photo on top, maroon panel with title beneath).
Top navigation items are laid out linearly, suggesting they would collapse into a hamburger or stacked list on small screens.
Centered body content on white implies a max-width content column for readability on large screens.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow. A slim full-width navigation bar sits at the very top. Immediately below is a large hero that spans the full viewport width, visually divided into two halves: left half is a wide photo of a circle of women holding hands in a large room; right half is a deep maroon panel with subtle floral imagery, containing a large multi-line school title and a large emblem near the bottom-right. Under the hero, the layout transitions to a white section with a centered heading ('Ahava') and likely subsequent text paragraph(s) aligned in a single, constrained column.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: On the initial viewport, the navigation bar occupies a small band (~8–10% of viewport height). The hero section dominates the remaining majority of the above-the-fold space (~70–80%), with the image taking roughly half the horizontal space and the maroon title panel taking the other half. Below the hero, white sections feature wide left/right margins (approx. 15–20% of viewport width), focusing attention on a narrow central column. Vertical spacing between sections is roomy, with generous padding above and below headings.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious editorial layout with ample breathing room. The hero is content-rich but not cluttered due to its clear split and large typographic scale. Below the hero, content is light and airy with large margins and relatively few elements per section, reflecting a calm spiritual retreat tone rather than an information-dense dashboard.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The eye begins at the upper left (logo) then moves across the top navigation (Website, My Music, Español, Blog, Login, Sign Up). From there, attention is pulled diagonally down into the right side of the hero where the large white title text on maroon resides. Then the gaze moves leftwards to fully take in the colorful group photograph, before continuing vertically down to the white section and the centered 'Ahava' heading. Overall, the eye follows a top-horizontal then diagonal-right and then vertical downward flow.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Buttons are not explicitly visible in the screenshot, but inferred from the navigation and design language: likely rectangular with mildly rounded corners (4–6px radius), filled with the primary maroon (#5D0010) or accent gold (#F2B544). Text likely set in white for contrast. Buttons would be flat or with extremely subtle shadow, relying more on color contrast and shape than heavy skeuomorphism. Padding around text would be medium (e.g., 12–14px vertical, 20–28px horizontal), giving them a ceremonial, deliberate feel rather than compact utility.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Semantically, main actions should be <button> elements styled with classes; secondary actions or navigation actions may use <a> tags styled as buttons (display: inline-flex or inline-block). For icon + text, an <i> or <svg> preceding the <span> text inside the button wrapper.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Cards are not shown clearly but can be inferred for future sections (e.g., courses or retreats). Stylistically they would use a white or very light rose background (#F7F4F2), 1px soft border in a pale rose/grey (#E4D6D0), and subtle corner rounding (6–8px). Shadows, if any, would be very soft (0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)) to maintain a gentle, spiritual feel. Inner padding would be generous (24–32px), with a clear title at top, body text, and possibly a small emblem or icon.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Form elements are not present in the screenshot, but informed by the aesthetic they would likely be clean and understated: full-width inputs with 1px soft borders in a muted neutral (#D9C9C4), 4–6px radius, and ample vertical padding (10–12px). Labels would most likely sit above the fields (left-aligned) for clarity. Focus states could use a maroon border and subtle glow. Validation messages should be small, aligned directly under the input, and using semantic colors (e.g., error text in #B6383A). Overall form density would be moderate, with 16–24px vertical spacing between fields.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Stacked form layout: each field in a <div class='form-group'> with <label> above an <input> or <textarea>. For longer forms, logical grouping with <fieldset> and <legend> (e.g., personal details, retreat preferences). Submit button placed at the bottom as a primary maroon or gold CTA.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal top navigation bar with a deep maroon background (#5D0010). Logo/emblem positioned at the far left, nav items aligned to the right in a single row. Nav text is set in white or a very light neutral, using a simple serif or sans-serif at small size. Spacing between links is moderate, offering a refined, non-bulky look. Active state is not visible but likely uses a subtle text color change (e.g., slightly lighter or gold) or underline. The bar is flat with no visible shadow, leaning toward a classic banner feel.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit lists are visible in this screenshot, but for sections like program offerings or blog posts, lists would probably be medium density and card- or media-based rather than simple bullet lists. Expect generous vertical spacing between items (12–20px) and subtle separators (soft lines in #E4D6D0 or pure whitespace). If using thumbnails, they would be large, soft-edged images with text to the right or below, maintaining the ceremonial visual tone.

heading.visual_style: High-contrast, elegant italic serif display style—thin hairlines and thick main strokes, with flowing, calligraphic curves that feel ceremonial and mystical.
heading.recommended: Playfair Display (for an elegant, high-contrast serif with strong italics) or alternatively Cormorant Garamond for a more ornamental, classical tone.

body.visual_style: Readable serif body copy that feels literary and contemplative rather than utilitarian. Likely a transitional or old-style serif with moderate contrast and good x-height.
body.recommended: Lora or Source Serif 4 as balanced, readable serifs that pair well with Playfair Display while maintaining a warm, book-like feel.

font_families.code: No code styling is needed for this site; if required, use 'Source Code Pro, monospace'.

spacing_system.component_padding: Major components (hero inner content, cards, large buttons) should typically use 24–32px internal padding (3–4 x 8px). Smaller items (inputs, small buttons) use 8–16px padding.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between main sections (e.g., hero to body content, content blocks on white) around 48–64px to maintain a spacious, meditative feel.

interaction_hints: Navigation links should use a subtle hover effect: slight text color shift (e.g., to #F2B544) and possibly an understated bottom border/underline transition.
Buttons should have a gentle hover elevation or background lightening/darkening (e.g., maroon to a slightly lighter maroon) and smooth 150–250ms transitions.
Hero emblem could have a very subtle scale or glow-on-hover micro-interaction to reinforce the sacred-symbol brand without feeling gimmicky.
Section entrances could use minimal fade-up or slide-in animations on scroll, with low amplitude and moderate duration, to align with the calm, ritualistic tone of a mystery school and retreat site.
